title: NotebookLM API SME Integration — Live Implementation
description: Full API-backed integration for SME_NotebookLM_Ang. Routes between Gemini+TTS (primary) and NotebookLM Enterprise Podcast API (premium) based on environment configuration.

request.description: The input payload for the NotebookLM generation API.

content.description: Raw text, URL, or file path to process.

focusPrompt.description: Optional focus directive to guide generation.

textContent.description: Generated script, briefing, or FAQ text.

audioUrl.description: URL to the generated MP3 or text file.

attachment.description: Payload for embedding in Guide_Ang chat.

generate.description: Standalone API-first endpoint. Any Boomer_Ang can call this directly.

guide_chat.description: Guide_Ang chat endpoint. Detects NotebookLM keywords and routes automatically.

pathA.name: Gemini + Google Cloud TTS
pathA.description: Primary path. Uses Gemini 3.1 Pro to generate podcast scripts, then Google Cloud TTS to synthesize audio. Available with GEMINI_API_KEY and GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN.
pathA.fallback: Template-based script generation (no API keys needed)

pathB.name: NotebookLM Enterprise Podcast API
pathB.description: Premium path. Direct call to Discovery Engine Podcast API. Requires allowlisted GCP project.

environmentVariables.GEMINI_API_KEY: Google AI Studio / Gemini API key for script generation
environmentVariables.GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN: OAuth2 access token for Google Cloud APIs (TTS, Discovery Engine)
environmentVariables.GCP_PROJECT_NUMBER: Google Cloud project number (for long-form TTS)
environmentVariables.NOTEBOOKLM_ENTERPRISE_ENABLED: Set to 'true' to use Enterprise Podcast API
environmentVariables.GCS_AUDIO_BUCKET: Optional GCS bucket for long-form audio output
environmentVariables.AUDIO_OUTPUT_DIR: Local directory for generated audio files
